results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities
Geopolitical market impacts and investment perspectives for 2026 | J.P. Morgan Private Bank

summary: Middle East conflict spiked energy prices with Strait of Hormuz closure risk. IMF projects global growth 3.1%, headline inflation 4.4% assuming short-lived conflict. U.S. Venezuela intervention, NATO in Greenland, Iran unrest are added flashpoints. Tariff uncertainty and US midterms also weigh. Oil eased slightly May 1 on ceasefire mediation progress.
